<objective>
Monthly retrospective over skill-adoption telemetry — ranks most-invoked, failing, and abandoned-mid-workflow skills, flags stale ones, and reports catalog telemetry coverage

Phases:

- scan: Read adoption telemetry and derive the retrospective report
- interpret: Read the rankings and coverage, separating real signal from telemetry gaps
- report: Write the dated report and surface highlights plus recommendations
